features: [High quality] Made of high quality 150g kraft paper, eco-friendly and recyclable, thickened and durable, strong structure, not easy to deform and damage, not easy to fade
[4 Styles] Included 4 different Christmas patterns: Snowman, Snowflakes, Christmas tree, Elk etc, bright colors and clear patterns, will add a cheerful Christmas flavor
[Easy to use] The colorful twist rope handle design, will not break or loose when held; The bottom is reinforced, will hold the gift safely, and can easily carry at least 10KG of weight
[Size] Bag: 51CM x 38CM x 18CM, extra large size, 2pcs bags of each style, included 8pcs oversized Christmas gift bags, perfect for packaging gaint Christmas gifts

[Applicable] Suitable for packaging oversized clothing, plush toys, beautifully wrapped boxes etc; Perfect for Christmas Eve gift boxes, Christmas birthday parties, Christmas weddings, or any other Christmas themed parties, has all the space need for big gifts!!!
